title: Turkey — destination shortlist + four DM drafts (Caden, Megan, Kai, John)
html:
Turkey — destination shortlist + four DM drafts (Caden, Megan, Kai, John)

Source: 2021-05-04 Apple Note titled "Turkey." Reads as a 4-line travel destination brainstorm (Egypt, Central America, Brazil) followed by four message drafts to four different people, capped by a payment line. The spine is the resignation letter to John (the Dutch Bros roasting facility manager).

TL;DR

  • Floats a post-graduation travel shortlist — Egypt, Central America, Brazil (Turkey is the title only; "Turkey" doesn't appear in the body — likely the trigger destination Yahir was riffing off).
  • Drafts an "old friend" check-in to Caden (single-mention; queued to Potential Entities) — "figured I should reach out to an old friend and say what's up."
  • Drafts an inquiry to Megan (artist, single-mention; queued) about a commissioned art piece for "my mentor" — earliest evidence of Yahir buying art-as-gift for Brenda or another mentor-figure.
  • Drafts a half-finished message to Kai — "my intuition is telling me to leave this job" — which the next draft completes.
  • Writes the actual resignation letter to John for the Dutch Bros roasting facility — the "some life conditions changed rather spontaneously" exit. Marks Yahir's first non-trivial career exit on record.

Pattern observed

The same note doing 5 things at once — destination wishlist + outreach drafts + resignation letter + payment ledger — fits the form perfectly. The "intuition is telling me to leave" phrasing is the first appearance in the corpus of intuition-as-decision-criteria, which becomes a regret minimization framework adjacent through-line.

Open questions

  • What was the precipitating "life conditions" change in early May 2021? (Final term of high school + graduation logistics — see 2021 05 30 dear mrs gerard.)
  • Was John ever a recurring Dutch Bros mentor or strictly a manager?
  • Did Megan actually deliver a commissioned piece?

Related

  • dutch bros
  • kai
  • brazil
  • egypt
